tweets:
5 journaling habits that separate profitable traders from the rest:

(thread)

1. Log BEFORE the trade

Write your thesis, entry, stop, and target BEFORE you click buy/sell.

This alone eliminates impulse trades.

2. Score your emotions (1-10)

Were you calm? Anxious? Revenge trading?

Over time, you'll see which emotional states lead to your best and worst trades.

3. Review weekly, not daily

Daily reviews = overreacting to noise.
Weekly reviews = spotting real patterns.

MarketPhase's War Room makes weekly reviews effortless.

4. Track what you DIDN'T trade

The setups you skipped matter. Were they winners? Losers?

This reveals if your filter is too tight or too loose.

5. Use AI to find blind spots

You can't see your own patterns objectively.

MarketPhase's AI Coach analyzes your trades and shows you what you're missing.

All free: https://marketphase.vercel.app
